abilities.description: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to you this turn, prevent that damage. If damage is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to that source's controller.

effect.description: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to you this turn, prevent that damage. If damage is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to that source's controller.
effect.name: ChooseSource
